next_steps: Immediate safety assessment and risk stratification for harm to self or infant
Initiate specialized cognitive-behavioral therapy for postpartum OCD (specifically exposure and response prevention)
Consider adjustment of pharmacotherapy (e.g., maximizing SSRI dosage or augmentation with an atypical antipsychotic if indicated by severity)
Implement intensive outpatient or partial hospital program support
Ensure regular maternal-infant monitoring and social support systems are active
Monitor blood pressure and continue medical management of hypertension
